response.justification: Wei Chen demonstrates broad engineering experience across multiple domains and languages, with strong open-source contributions and full-stack fluency, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product leadership, cloud platform strategy experience, or the 15-year tenure required — his professional history is fragmented and includes roles that are too recent or unrelated to AI strategy at a director-level IC scale.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Active open-source contributor with AI-agent infrastructure and GIS platform development
Proven ability to lead technical initiatives and mentor others through workshops and community projects
concerns: No clear demonstration of AI/ML product development or cloud platform strategy experience
Professional timeline appears compressed — unlikely to meet 15-year experience requirement
Lacks documented leadership in enterprise AI adoption or strategic customer advisory roles
